event_summary: T-Mobile is expanding into digital education and AI, leveraging its 5G network, which may enhance its growth prospects and investment case.
International General Insurance Holdings Ltd. saw a 24.3% increase in short interest despite strong quarterly earnings and a dividend announcement.
Citigroup raised Occidental Petroleum's price target to $67, maintaining a Neutral rating, indicating mixed analyst perspectives on stock performance.
TD issues 24-27 month MSCI EAFE-linked notes with principal at risk, potentially affecting investor sentiment in the financial sector.
UnitedHealth Group saw its shares rise 1.1% after reporting strong quarterly earnings that beat expectations, despite analysts trimming price targets.
Home Depot's Spring Sale features significant deals including free power tools and discounts on various home categories.
Pfizer shares rose 2.6% due to interest in its GLP-1 program and high-dividend appeal, despite mixed analyst sentiment and competitive pressures.
Ranpak seeks shareholder approval for proposals including issuing additional shares linked to a warrant from Walmart.
Netflix is reportedly looking to significantly expand its National Football League content by securing a four-game package, doubling its current NFL coverage.
Immix Biopharma has completed enrollment for its NEXICART-2 Phase 2 trial of CAR-T therapy NXC-201 for relapsed/refractory AL amyloidosis, with topline results expected in Q3 2026.
Freeport-McMoRan shares dropped 2.9% after UBS downgraded its price target, despite maintaining a buy rating.
Tesla's Robotaxi service has established a new hub in downtown Oakland, marking its second location in the East Bay.
ConocoPhillips outlines its 2026 outlook focusing on production growth in North America.
The Walt Disney Company is adapting to the changing entertainment landscape with a focus on streaming profitability and leveraging its diverse portfolio.
AMD stock is expected to recover in the second half of 2026 due to the launch of new AI products, potentially attracting investors and improving margins.
AMD stock may see growth due to upcoming product launches and revenue increases in the second half of 2026.
Boston Scientific Corp (BSX) stock closed down 9.06% due to analyst downgrades, concerns over growth forecasts, and ongoing legal challenges, despite positive clinical trial data.
Arista Networks Inc (ANET) stock closed down by 3.82% on March 30, influenced by broader market caution, high valuation multiples, insider selling, and competitive pressures.
Franklin BSP Realty Trust (NYSE:FBRT) experienced a 26.4% increase in short interest, with analysts rating it as a 'Moderate Buy'.

Jefferies Financial Group has reiterated a 'Buy' rating on InterContinental Hotels Group (IHG), suggesting a potential upside of 25.32%. Other analysts also maintain positive outlooks, contributing to a consensus 'Moderate Buy' rating for IHG.
